text.title: Spring Boot JUnit Testing Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: use @WebMvcTest(Controller.class) + @MockBean service; mock only the direct collaborator
use @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class); no Spring context; AssertJ for collections

branch.question: Real DB engine available via Testcontainers?

conclusion.verdict: install Docker on CI before scaffolding; H2 is forbidden
use @DataJpaTest + @Container PostgreSQLContainer; OSIV off in application-test.yml
single @SpringBootTest per module; do not scatter the annotation
Awaitility for async assertions; inject Clock bean for time-sensitive logic
